title: viburnum opulus var. pubinerve
intro: Viburnum opulus var. pubinerve, also known as the guelder rose or European cranberrybush, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Viburnum opulus var. pubinerve include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and support the immune system, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Viburnum opulus var. pubinerve can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
